nasb.text: When He came into the house, His disciples began questioning Him privately, “Why could we not drive it out?”

esv.text: And when he had entered the house, his disciples asked him privately, “Why could we not cast it out?”

cnv.text: 耶穌進了屋子，門徒私下問他說：“為甚麼我們不能把那污鬼趕出去呢？”

ccb.text: 耶稣进屋后，门徒悄悄问祂：“我们为什么赶不走那鬼呢？”

csbs.text: 耶稣进了房子，他的门徒们就悄悄地问他：“我们为什么不能赶出那邪灵呢？”
